description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.3: Sidecar privacy (no silent cascade to Zen/localhost — explicit configuration required via roampal sidecar setup). opencode.json safety (configure_opencode no longer silently clobbers user config on JSON parse failure; atomic writes with timestamped backup). Retrieval bug fixes (TagCascade $contains where-clause silently broken — now actually filters; memory_bank multi-key filters $and-wrapped; server-side noun_tags extraction wired into /record-outcome and /api/hooks/stop, closing the gap where summaries and facts stored via OpenCode plugin had empty tags). Sidecar JSON-shape tolerance for 3B-class models (qwen2.5:3b bare-array responses). Pre-store fact dedup ported from Roampal Desktop v0.3.2 — closes the shared-ChromaDB hole where core writes bypassed desktop's existing dedup. Scope-aware sidecar CLI (status/setup/disable now report and target user-global vs project-local opencode.json with --scope user|project|both). Atomic JSON writes for profiles.json and session state. 560 backend unit tests passing.
